entities.name: LETTUCE
entities.description: Lactuca sativa L., the crop being studied for seed viability and chromosome damage

entities.name: SEED MOISTURE CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of water in the seeds, which influences the rate of chromosome damage and loss of viability

entities.name: TEMPERATURE
entities.description: The thermal environment affecting the rate of chromosome damage and loss of seed viability

entities.name: CHROMOSOME DAMAGE
entities.description: The accumulation of cells containing chromosome aberrations in seeds

entities.name: SEED VIABILITY
entities.description: The ability of the seed to germinate and grow, the loss of which is studied in relation to environmental factors
